samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="STATE" type="uint8">
            <enum-value id="IDLE" value="0x00">Idle state.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="ADD" value="0x01">Addition state.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="SHIFT" value="0x02">Shifting state.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[15:0]" id="product_reg">16-bit register to store the product.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="shift_cnt">8-bit register to count shifts.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state">State register for the FSM.</reg>
        <reg type="combinational_logic" id="addition_result">Reg to store the result of the addition.</reg>
        <reg type="combinational_logic" id="shift_result">Reg to store the result of the shift operation.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <enum-verbatim id="STATE">STATE_IDLE</enum-verbatim>
        <enum-verbatim id="STATE">STATE_ADD</enum-verbatim>
        <enum-verbatim id="STATE">STATE_SHIFT</enum-verbatim>
        <always>
            <sequential>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <nonblocking>
                            <item>$state = STATE_IDLE;</item>
                        </nonblocking>
                    </true>
                    <clock-edge-sensitive>
                        <item>sense == 1'b1</item>
                    </clock-edge-sensitive>
                </if>
            </sequential>
        </always>
        <always>
            <sequential>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <nonblocking>
                            <item>$state = STATE_IDLE;</item>
                        </nonblocking>
                    </true>
                    <clock-edge-sensitive>
                        <item>sense == 1'b1</item>
                    </clock-edge-sensitive>
                </if>
            </sequential>
        </always>
        <always>
            <sequential>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <nonblocking>
                            <item>$state = STATE_IDLE;</item>
                        </nonblocking>
                    </true>
                    <clock-edge-sensitive>
                        <item>sense == 1'b1</item>
                    </clock-edge-sensitive>
                </if>
            </sequential>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
